title: Minneapolis Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Minneapolis with a Z-Score of -3.09. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current temperature in Minneapolis is significantly lower than average, with a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 54%, and the wind speed is moderate at 6.1 km/h. 
 The city can expect extremely cold conditions to persist, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) recorded.
